app.title: Slay the Robot
menu.vocab_console_domain_label: Personal interests (always used for generated examples)
menu.vocab_console_summary: Overview: new {0} · due {1} · books {2} · pool {3} · examples {4}
menu.vocab_console_today_stats: New words: {0} · Due review: {1} (today active: {2}) · Learned: {3}/{4}
menu.vocab_daily_cap_label: Daily review cap (when many words are due)
menu.vocab_daily_cap_hint: 0 = no limit. If > 0, each calendar day a random subset of that size is drawn from due words for card-review prompts; the subset changes the next day.
menu.vocab_daily_new_hint: Each calendar day, this many not-yet-learned words (merged-book order) are queued first before due-review prompts during combat checks. 0 = disable priority (same as legacy behavior).
menu.vocab_ordered_batch_hint: Each calendar day, on first run start, take this many words in merged-book load order, call the API, and save to user://vocab_example_cache.json. 0 disables. Example style uses the checkboxes above.
menu.vocab_learn_steps_hint: After the intro card, run only the checked steps (fixed order). At least one must stay on.
menu.vocab_review_modes_hint: Each draw before playing a card picks one checked type at random. At least one must stay on. Legacy single-mode field syncs to the first checked item.
menu.vocab_review_mode_hint: Four modes: spelling; Chinese meaning → pick English (4 choices); pick English from prompt+distractors (4 choices); self-check (remember/forgot). Forgot resets the word to unlearned.
menu.vocab_import_failed: Import failed (JSON shape, book_id, or path).
menu.vocab_book_delete_confirm: Delete word book "{0}"? This cannot be undone.
menu.vocab_book_keep_one: Keep at least one word book enabled.
menu.vocab_book_builtin_tooltip: Built into the project as the fallback word list. It cannot be deleted, but you can uncheck it after enabling another book.
menu.vocab_book_packaged_tooltip: Bundled with the project. It cannot be deleted, but it can be unchecked.
menu.vocab_book_user_tooltip: Imported by you. It can be unchecked or deleted with ×.
shop.hint: Tap an item to buy. Red prices mean you cannot afford it.
rest.title: Rest Site
rest.hint: Check the effect first, then choose this campfire action.
rest.preview.empty: Tap or point at an action to preview exactly what it will do.
rest.preview.upgrade: Choose 1 upgradeable card. After confirming, the upgraded card name and effect will appear here.
rest.preview.remove: Choose cards to remove from your deck. The removed card will be shown after confirmation.
rest.preview.consumable_full: Your potion slots are full, so this action will not grant a new item right now.
rest.preview.damage: Trigger the rest-site damage boost effect.
rest.preview.study: Study the shelves: heal a little and gain some money.
rest.result.consumable_full: Potion slots are full. No new potion was gained.
rest.result.health_money: Done: healed {0} HP and gained {1} money.
overlay.summary_hint_victory: Open the report to review your route, deck, and vocabulary results.
overlay.summary_hint_defeat: Check the report to see whether route, deck, or vocabulary review held this run back.
overlay.summary_hint_quit: This run is saved. You can read the report before returning to the main menu.
run.stats.subtitle: {0} · Difficulty {1} · Seed {2}
overlay.vocab_domains_hint: Saved to external/user_settings.json for tools/generate_vocab_examples.py (merged with .env).
overlay.vocab_api_key_ph: API key (optional if OPENAI_API_KEY is set)
overlay.vocab_fetch_on_review: Fetch examples on card review when missing (needs API key)
vocab.no_examples_hint: (No examples yet: put OPENAI_API_KEY in project .env or user settings, and/or use daily ordered batch. If a key is set but this persists, check the Output panel for API errors.)
vocab.review.quiz_hidden_note: The quiz hides the word and answer-bearing examples.
vocab.review.meaning_hide_hint: (The original prompt line that shows the English headword is hidden for this question.)
vocab.review.meaning_instruction: Type the correct English spelling below (lowercase, same as the book answer).
vocab.review.meaning_mc_label: Pick the English word from the Chinese meaning
vocab.review.meaning_mc_instruction: Tap one of the four English options (lowercase matching as in the book).
vocab.review.spell_label: Type the English word from the meaning
vocab.review.spell_instruction: The word itself is hidden; it is marked learned only after a correct answer.
vocab.review.no_safe_prompt: This entry's prompt contained the answer and was hidden; add a Chinese meaning for a better question.
vocab.review.dictation_instruction: Play audio if available, then type the English word.
vocab.review.try_again: Wrong. Try again or skip. ({0} tries left.)
vocab.review.mc_wrong_cap: Too many wrong picks — counted as failed.
vocab.api.need_key: No API key (set here or OPENAI_API_KEY).
vocab.api.builtin_skip: Skipping builtin_default (use external tools or edit JSON).
vocab.api.saved: Saved under user://vocab_books/ and reloaded. Generated %d entries.
vocab.api.none_needed: No examples written this run (or all entries already have some). Large books pick random entries each time—run generate again.
